title: Pharnaceum verticillatum
taxonomy: Pharnaceum verticillatum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. This plant is native to Europe and Western Asia. It is a prostrate or decumbent annual herb, typically growing up to 10-30 cm in height. The species is further classified within the genus Pharnaceum, which belongs to the order Caryophyllales. Its classification is part of the larger system of plant taxonomy.
